blocks.text: Award-Winning Landscaping Services
CONTACT US
CONTACT US
Designing Oahu's Gardens since 1975.
Landscape design, installation, repairs & more...

For over 40 years Mulkern Landscaping has designed and maintained landscapes from urban Honolulu, to East Oahu and Kailua. Specializing in bringing your dream landscape to life, Mulkern Landscaping’s team are the local experts in water feature installation, night lighting, and full-service landscaping projects. Find inspiration in a few of our Honolulu landscaping projects below.
Landscape Consultations
Plan with the island's top landscaping professionals
New Landscape Installations
Professional installations for your dream landscape
Landscape Renovations
Reimagine your existing outdoor living spaces
Custom Landscape Maintenance
Keep your yard tidy with regular visits by professional crews
Sprinkler Installation & Repair
Keep your lawn and garden green and hydrated
Natural Water Features
Add ponds, fountains and water features to your outdoor space
We cover Honolulu, East & Windward Oahu

blocks.text: About Us
Over 40 Years in Business
Expert Landscape Design, Installation & Maintenance
Founded in 1975

In June 1975 Kevin Mulkern started his landscaping business with a tiny Datsun pickup truck, a mower and a few hand tools. He began with an 8 hour work week and a lot of time for surfing. Kevin’s goal was to provide the best landscape maintenance service in the state. Soon after Kevin’s wife Susan joined him in the business and there was a lot less time for surfing. From designing small commercial projects to maintaining 3 acre estates, Kevin’s range of landscape skills and customer service is unparalleled. Over the years Mulkern Landscaping has worked for thousands of local customers and his hope is there will be thousands more.
Award-winning landscapes
For years to come

Mulkern Landscaping specializes in creating and maintaining outdoor living spaces and landscapes on Oahu. From simple garden landscapes to resort-style luxury outdoor living spaces, our team of expert landscaping professionals is dedicated to providing you with the most reliable, professional, and top-notch service. The Mulkerns’ nursery is located in Waimanalo and open to the public on Saturdays or by appointment. If you’d like to get to know our team before you purchase our services, attend a free monthly workshop at our nursery.

In 2014 and 2015 Mulkern won Honolulu Magazine’s award for Best Landscaper. The company also received the Award of Honor in the 2014 Betty Crocker Landscape Awards from Scenic Hawaii. Mulkern Landscaping continues to have excellent reviews from our customers. The Better Business Bureau rated us A+ and Google and Yelp give us 5 Stars. Mahalo to all our loyal customers past and present for the kind words and nominations!
Our Team of Landscaping Experts

Mulkern Landscaping specializes in creating and maintaining outdoor living spaces and landscapes on Oahu. From simple garden landscapes to resort-style luxury outdoor living spaces, our team of expert landscaping professionals is dedicated to providing you with the most reliable, professional, and top-notch service. The Mulkerns’ nursery is located in Waimanalo and open to the public on Saturdays or by appointment. If you’d like to get to know our team before you purchase our services, attend a free monthly workshop at our nursery.
Kevin Mulkern
president

Kevin formed Mulkern Landscaping in 1975 after studying marine science and horticulture at Leeward Community College (LCC). A graduate of Kalani and LCC, Kevin has spent his life advocating for a landscape industry based on principles of sustainability and quality craftsmanship. He actively volunteers as a Kuliouou/Kalani Iki Neighborhood Board member and for environmental issues.
Susan Mulkern
Vice-president

The head of administration, Susan has over 40 years experience in the landscape industry. A Punahou alumni and University of California, Los Angeles (UCLA) graduate. Susan usually handles initial consultations, accounting and business operations. Kevin consistently credits his wife Susan with Mulkern Landscaping’s success because of her extensive office and bookkeeping knowledge.
Allen Griffin
Manager

Allen works in the office and out in the field assisting our staff and responding to customer concerns. He is a talented fixer, from sprinklers and ponds to landscape equipment. Allen is a University of Maryland alumni and long time west Oahu resident. He will attend the Landscape Industry Certified Technician (LICT) training for Irrigation this summer. Come say hi to Allen Saturdays at our Waimanalo Nursery.
What Defines us
Team Of Professionals
We have Landscape Industry Certified Technicians on the job
Reliable Service
Trust us to get the job done
Satisfaction Guarantee
We stand behind our services
45 Years In Business
Our company is here to stay
Landscaping Experts
Continuing education for everyone is a top priority
Eco Friendly Co.
Environmentally conscious services are available
Our Partners

blocks.text: Our Services

From simple garden landscapes to resort-style luxury outdoor living spaces, our team of expert landscaping professionals is dedicated to providing you with the most reliable, professional, and top-notch service.
Landscape Designs & Consultations

The landscape consultation service includes a 1 hour site meeting consisting of advice, ideas, on site analysis and written recommendations, estimates and contractor referrals for work outside our area of expertise. Please see our Services page for current rates. Additional time can be arranged for if needed. Please note the landscape consultation is not a design service but a preliminary step to a landscape master plan.
New Landscape Installations
Whether your backyard needs a pick-me-up, or you’d like to install water features and night lighting, our team can help.
Landscape Renovations
Restore your landscape with a renovation. A “spring cleaning” gets your garden in shape if regular maintenance hasn’t been effective.
Custom Landscape Maintenance
Our team of expert landscapers will help you create and manage maintenance goals to keep your landscape healthy and beautiful all year round.
Sprinkler Installation & Repair
Don’t worry about under or over watering. Mulkern Landscaping has been installing and maintaining the best sprinkler systems on Oahu for over 40 years.
Natural Water Features
Over 25 years of experience designing, installing, repairing and cleaning water features, ponds, waterfalls and fountains.
Landscape Lighting
Low voltage landscape lighting installation and repair services are available.
DIY Gardener Assistance
Whether your backyard needs a pick-me-up, or you’d like to install water features and night lighting, our team can help.
Plant Delivery
Paid delivery available when plants purchased at Mulkern Nursery in Waimanalo.
Upfront Pricing
Repairs
$115/man hour Repair and installation available for sprinkler systems, ponds & water features, low voltage outdoor lighting systems. 2 Hour Minimum.
Landscape Consultation

$165.00 per hour Includes 1 hour site meeting consisting of advice, ideas, on site analysis + 2 hour for written recommendations, prices, contractor referrals and our proposal. For Oahu from the Pali Highway to Hanauma Bay - 3 hour minimum; total $495.00 + tax Sea Life Park to Kailua Road - 4 hour minimum; total $660.00 + tax
General Labor & Plant Delivery
$77/man hour Island wide curbside delivery. Planting service available. 2 Hour Minimum.
Inquire With Us

blocks.text: Our Portfolio
Night Lighting
Kuliou'ou, Oahu
We live in paradise, your backyard should be paradise, too. Designs usually take 50 hours depending on size and intricacy of project.
Landscape Revival
DIAMOND HEAD, OAHU

This Diamond Head Road resident requested a landscape restoration. Armed with old photos and hand drawings the couple asked Mulkern to get this landscape back to it’s 1950’s self with a few modern twists.
Services provided include landscape design, project management, installation, maintenance, irrigation, and low voltage landscape lighting.
Unique Landscapes
WILHEMINA RISE, OAHU

This residential project located in Oahu’s Wilhelmina Rise district at the edge of a cliff. Mulkern strategically developed this vertical hillside property into usable space for the homeowner with vibrant, low water plants over a decade. The highest standards of safety were adhered to at every level of the project.
Services to the homeowner included design, project management, installation, maintenance, boulder removal, hillside stabilization and more.
Native Hawaiian Plants
St. Louis Heights, OAHU

A residential project located in Oahu’s Saint Louis Heights district minutes from the University of Hawaii. The homeowner requested an updated landscape design that mixed Native Hawaiian and low maintenance plant choices. Maintenance service continues to this day.
Services to the homeowner included design, project management, installation, maintenance and landscape lighting.
Going Back to Green
KAHALA, OAHU

This beautiful home minutes from the beach in Kahala once had a backyard concreted over by a previous owner. The new homeowner wanted more green so as part of the new landscape design and installation the Mulkern crew ripped out the concrete and installed a new lawn.
Services included landscape design, installation, maintenance, lighting and irrigation.
Inquire With Us

blocks.text: Our Nursery
Our Nursery
Located in beautiful Waimanalo
Open Saturdays 8:30 - 4:00.

Our Waimanalo nursery has one of the largest selections of water lilies, bamboo and lotus on Oahu. We also have a wide variety of tropical plants that grow well across the island. Shop over 30 varieties of bamboo including specialty varieties, like black timor, wamin and rare sacred bali. Mulkern Landscaping & Nursery also hosts free workshops monthly on landscape topics, such as pruning, lotus care, bamboo, garden and water feature design, restoration, etc.
Water Lilies

Mulkern Nursery has the best selection of water lilies on Oahu. Water lilies are aquatic plants with fragrant, vibrant flowers. Generally, water lily leaves and flowers float on the surface of the water. Flowers last an average of 2 – 5 days and come in a range of colors. Water lilies are seasonal plants but in tropical climates can bloom all year long. Varieties vary greatly – some, like the Woods White Knight, even bloom at night!
Bamboo

Mulkern Nursery specializes in rare bamboos and has imported many different varieties. Some of the types of bamboo we carry are: Giant Golden, Timor Black, Sacred Bali, Fishpole, Feather, Buddha Belly, Fern, Monastery, and much more.

Bamboo is a type of grass originally from East Asia. It is the fastest growing plant in the world and has been used to combat soil erosion in Hawaii. Bamboo has long been used for food and shelter in various parts of Asia and even has medicinal uses.
Lotus
Mulkern Nursery has ten different varieties of lotus that differ in color, shape and scent.

Lotus have tall leaves and flowers that can shoot up many inches above the water’s surface. Flowers range in size and color but are commonly pink, white, yellow and red. Some blossoms are very fragrant. Lotus is edible and is also used in medicine.

blocks.text: Employment opportunities

Are you looking for a dynamic career that combines creativity, nature, and technology? Mulkern Landscaping & Nursery is seeking passionate individuals to join our innovative team! We are always willing to train unskilled individuals without experience and value those with knowledge, background and passion for the green industry.
About Us

For over 40 years, we’ve been transforming landscapes across Honolulu and East Oahu, specializing in water features, night lighting, and full-service landscaping projects. Our diverse services and unique nursery, featuring bamboo and water plants, make us a leader in the industry.
Available Positions
First and foremost, we are in the landscape construction and maintenance business.
Landscape Maintenance & Landscape Construction
-Passion for plants
-Desire to learn new techniques
-Willing to pull weeds, mow, plant, plow and make repairs to irrigation systems -Gardening experience
-Landscaping & irrigation experience
Nursery & Farm Associate
– Hands-on role perfect for nature enthusiasts
– Learn about organic farming and ornamental plant cultivation
– Flexible schedules available, including Saturday shifts
– Gain valuable experience in sustainable agriculture
Remote Design Specialist
– Flex your creative muscles from the comfort of your home
– Perfect for those with fine arts, graphics, or architectural skills
– 80% remote work with occasional in-person brainstorming sessions
– Bring landscapes to life through innovative designs
Digital Organization Guru
– Modernize our systems and streamline our operations
– Convert existing data into user-friendly, searchable formats
– Create customized mailing lists for targeted communications
– Ideal for tech-savvy individuals with strong organizational skills
Perks and Benefits
– Work-Life Balance: Flexible schedules and remote work options

– Growth Opportunities: Learn diverse skills in landscaping, design, and agriculture – Eco-Friendly Environment: Work with organic farming practices and sustainable landscaping – Innovative Projects: Contribute to cutting-edge landscape designs and water features – Team Collaboration: Join a passionate team dedicated to transforming outdoor spaces
– Unique Opportunities
– WWOOF-Inspired Program
– Live and work on our organic farm and ornamental plant nursery
– Ideal for those seeking an immersive agricultural experience
– Amenities provided: camping space, laundry facilities, hot showers

Join us creating beautiful, sustainable landscapes across Hawaii. At Mulkern Landscaping & Nursery, your creativity and passion can flourish in a supportive, nature-centric environment. Apply now using the form below and become a part of our growing team!
Send us a message or Send us your Resume.
We cover Honolulu, East & Windward Oahu
Our Nursery
Our nursery is open Saturdays from 8:30 – 4:00 and by appointment. 41-639 Kaulukanu St, Waimanalo *No mail accepted here*
Our Farm
Our farm at the corner of Waikupanaha & Kaulukanu Streets
is available by appointment only. Enjoy our collection of specimen bamboo. 41-831 Kaulukanu St, Waimanalo *No mail accepted here*
